hero.headline: You don't buy into a horse. You join a stable.
hero.subheadline: Racehorse ownership has never been about spreadsheets. It's about walking the yard at dawn, watching a 2-year-old come alive on the bridle, and standing somewhere near the rails while a horse you own runs past. Evolution Stables scales that experience — without losing the parts that matter.

about.headline: Own the Experience
about.body: Ownership is the lifeblood of racing — and strengthening it benefits every part of the industry. But for 200 years, it meant knowing the trainer, walking the yard, feeling the pulse of a syndicate. Evolution Stables doesn't replace that. We scale it. Every member gets the access, the updates, and the trackside moments that used to belong to a handful of insiders.

howItWorks.headline: How It Works
howItWorks.intro: At Evolution Stables, we understand that ownership is the lifeblood of racing — and strengthening it benefits every part of the industry.

steps.title: Choose your stable
steps.description: Each horse lives with a trainer. Each trainer has a record, a philosophy, and a yard. You pick the stable that matches how you want to race.

steps.title: Follow the campaign
steps.description: Trackwork updates, race plans, veterinary reports. No black boxes. No surprises. Just the life of a horse in training, reported straight.

steps.title: Race day, together
steps.description: The group chat. The silks. The moment. Whether you're trackside or timezone-crossing, you own the experience — not just a percentage.

stables.headline: The Horses, The Trainers, The Track
stables.intro: Every horse in the Evolution network is in a trainer's yard. That means real people, real routines, real mornings. These are the campaigns currently open or recently completed.

marketplace.headline: Transformation Powered by Tokinvest
marketplace.intro: Behind our integrated marketplace, Tokinvest delivers the infrastructure that powers digital-syndication — built on regulated, financial-grade rails, tailored from institutional finance and adapted to meet the demands of modern owners.

features.title: Discover Opportunities
features.description: Explore available syndications and short-term leases — all clearly structured, fully transparent, and ready to invest in with confidence.

features.title: Trade with Confidence
features.description: Tokinvest's regulated platform ensures secure transactions, immutable ownership records, and integrated settlements — so every trade is safe, clear, and straightforward.

features.title: Real-Time Insight
features.description: Follow your horses, track performance, and manage your positions in real time — with ownership data, updates, and key information always at your fingertips.

footer.headline: The first rule of Evolution Stables: you tell everyone.
